# LangSight

> Runtime reliability platform for AI agent toolchains — detect loops, enforce budgets, monitor MCP health, scan for security issues, and map blast radius.

LangSight is open-source (Apache 2.0) and fully self-hosted. It is complementary to Langfuse, LangSmith, and LangWatch — those tools evaluate prompts and LLM quality. LangSight monitors the tool layer: MCP servers, agent tool calls, their health, cost, and safety.

Current version: v0.14.18
Language: Python 3.11+
License: Apache 2.0
Install: pip install langsight
Self-host: docker compose up -d (5 containers: API, dashboard, Postgres, ClickHouse, optional Redis)
GitHub: https://github.com/LangSight/langsight
Docs: https://docs.langsight.dev

## What LangSight does

- Loop detection: terminates a session when the same tool is called with the same arguments 3+ times in a row
- Budget guardrails: configurable hard cost and step limits per agent session
- Circuit breaker: auto-disables a failing MCP tool after N consecutive errors; re-enables after cooldown
- MCP health monitoring: continuous health checks, uptime tracking, latency history, schema drift detection
- Security scanning: CVE checks via OSV API, 5 of 10 OWASP MCP Top 10 checks, tool poisoning / prompt injection detection, auth audit
- Cost attribution: per-tool, per-agent, per-session cost breakdown with token-level detail
- Blast radius mapping: lineage DAG showing which agents call which MCP servers; impact count when a server goes down
- Multi-agent call trees: full parent-child span hierarchy across agent handoffs
- Alerting: Slack (Block Kit) and generic webhook; 8 alert types including anomaly detection (z-score vs 7-day baseline)
- AI root cause investigation: one-click investigation using Claude to diagnose agent failures

## Integrations (verified)

- Claude Agent SDK (zero-code auto_patch())
- Anthropic SDK (Messages API + streaming)
- CrewAI (native event bus, 19 handlers, A2A handoffs)
- OTLP / OpenTelemetry (any OTEL-compatible framework, any language)

## Integrations (beta)

- OpenAI SDK
- Google Gemini Generative AI SDK

## What LangSight does NOT do

- Prompt evaluation or optimization (use Langfuse, LangSmith, LangWatch)
- Model-level cost tracking at the billing level (use Langfuse)
- Agent simulation or testing (use LangWatch)
- Keyword: this is not a session replay tool
